title: Stacked Blocks: Farmer's Delight
description: A compatibility mod for Stacked Blocks and Farmer's Delight.
body:
![Stacked Blocks: Farmer's Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LQlQFBH9/images/63094b4b88c4f5123af0bcd24ef4f741b1224ee5.png)
**Combine rope from Farmer's Delight with Stacked Blocks for easy crafting!** This add-on for **Stacked Blocks** lets you compress blocks using rope from Farmer's Delight to craft tied stacks. ## 🧺 Features - Compress blocks like wooden logs, stone, netherrack, melons, and more using rope from Farmer's Delight. - Craft **Stacked Rich Soil**, perfect for growing your crops later on. - Free up valuable chest space for your farm resources.
## ✨ Seamless Integration: - Simply craft rope and use it to make stackable blocks! [Download Farmer's Delight here](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight). [![Saving for a laptop!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/491c87c96cd602ec45774ce0b0cb9fe4d25ba074.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn)
